metadata.title: DRIVE CLEAN
metadata.description: Descubra o DRIVE CLEAN: higienização eficaz da sua viatura com ozono. Elimine bactérias, vírus e fungos, garantindo um interior da viatura seguro.

sections.heading: Drive Clean
content: Ozone Sanitation

sections.heading: We sanitize your vehicle quickly, simply and effectively.
content: DRIVE CLEAN is a vehicle cleaning service, carried out with ozone. It is an effective method to eliminate harmful microorganisms from the interior of your car, including disinfecting the passenger compartment and air conditioning ducts of the car.

sections.heading: WHAT IS OZONE SANITIZATION USED FOR?
content: When we talk about disinfection, ozone is 600 times more efficient than chlorine. It is effective in destroying microorganisms and is even used in hospital hygiene. In addition to its efficiency in cleaning, this method does not use water or chemicals that can harm the environment, cause allergies or damage the car's materials. In addition, it prevents the spread of viruses and bacteria that could be acquired through contact with the interior of the car.
Attention: hygiene does not prevent transmission by direct contact with people infected with any type of virus.
After the execution of Ozonation, the vehicle remains in isolation for another 30 minutes, so that the gas used dissipates and the Ozone (O3) decomposes again into oxygen (O2).
list_items: Disinfects the air and surfaces of the vehicle, destroying bacteria, viruses and fungi
It is effective in destroying microorganisms
Prevents the spread of viruses and bacteria
Purifies the air inside the car and treats unwanted odours (acts as a deodorant)
Disinfects places where sprays or foggers have greater difficulty reaching – including the air conditioning system

sections.heading: HOW DOES OZONATION WORK?
content: The cleaning of vehicles is carried out with an Ozone generating machine, through the so-called Ozonation process.

Ozone is a highly reactive gas, which is produced when oxygen (O2) interacts with electrical energy or ultraviolet radiation, generating tri-atomic oxygen molecules – Ozone (O3). The extra oxygen molecule in Ozone binds to the molecules of the harmful material (viruses, bacteria, fungi, odors, etc.). In this way, it oxidizes that same material, transforming it back into oxygen (O2).

sections.heading: IS THIS METHOD SAFE?
content: Ozone is a gas that can be dangerous when inhaled in its concentrated form. For that same reason, the ozonation process is done in a closed environment - without the presence of people - and your car is kept safe until the gas dissipates. After the gas dissipates (O3 turns back into O2), it is completely safe to use your car again. Our technicians are trained to disinfect your vehicle safely.
With the hectic pace of our days, the hours spent in traffic and the increasing air pollution, it is advisable to regularly disinfect the interior of your vehicle – 1 to 2 times a year.
To request a quote, consult the Glassdrive® Center closest to you .

Make your appointment with us. Your safety is our priority!

metadata.title: Optical Polishing
metadata.description: Melhore a segurança noturna com o polimento de faróis na GLASSDRIVE. Técnicas não invasivas restauram a clareza das óticas para uma condução segura.

sections.heading: Headlight Polishing
content: At Glassdrive®, thanks to the polishing of your headlights, they will look like new!

sections.heading: At Glassdrive® thanks to the polishing of your headlights, they will look like new!
content: The vast majority of headlights – the road lighting system installed at the front of the vehicle – are made of polycarbonate, a lighter and more resistant material than the old glass parts used until the late 1990s. The only downside is that these new plastic surfaces tend to stain very quickly, with the risk of impairing drivers' visibility. When it is necessary to renew, Glassdrive® has a specialized service to restore the original brightness and transparency of your headlights. There is no need to change them: a simple cleaning and polishing allows the headlights of your headlights to regain their initial performance, as if they were new!

sections.heading: Why do your car optics become opaque?
content: Polycarbonate, now used in most vehicle optics, has a number of technical advantages: this plastic material is less heavy, absorbs shocks better and has a greater capacity to diffuse light beams than older headlights covered with ribbed glass. Another advantage for manufacturers is that it is more malleable, and therefore allows for innovative and daring designs, and offers more aesthetic and differentiating possibilities for brands. The main disadvantage of polycarbonate is its tendency to deteriorate quickly: automotive professionals estimate that its original varnish loses its shine after an average of two years of use. This yellowing is explained by its particular sensitivity to certain external agents to which it is directly exposed: ultraviolet rays, bad weather, polluting particles and the numerous particles of dirt that cling to its surface, to the point of forming, by accumulation, a layer of dirt that is sometimes very thick.

sections.heading: Why renew headlight lenses?
content: A driver who notices a loss of transparency in his headlights should take care of them as soon as possible, for at least three reasons:
Another tip: don't let your headlights deteriorate over time without taking action. Regular maintenance will prevent you from having to change them.
list_items: To improve safety: opaque headlights reduce the driver's visibility at night by 30% to 40%.

To comply with the law: a car with headlights heavily oxidized by the sun can fail the inspection technicians and lead to its mandatory renewal, followed by a second test. Under penalty of immobilization.
Take care of the appearance of your vehicle: yellowing headlights damage the image of your vehicle. This is one of the many elements to consider when considering a possible resale.

sections.heading: Polishing of optics of the highest quality
content: Glassdrive® offers the highest quality optics polish, which makes the optics look as good as new. The appearance of the car is improved, the car becomes more visible to others and you get optimized road visibility. We polish headlight optics on all types of cars and brands.

sections.heading: How much does the optical polishing service cost
content: A polish on the Glassdrive® costs much less than replacing the entire optical block! The optical polishing service takes about 1 hour. The price varies depending on the make and model of the vehicle. You must book the service in advance with a Glassdrive® Center closest to you. For more information, contact us at 808 246 246.

Your safety is our priority!

metadata.title: Películas Auto Glassdrive

sections.heading: Window film
content: (dimming, safety, anti-UV)

sections.heading: Car window tinting
content: Window tinting is an increasingly popular choice due to the various benefits it offers when it comes to sun protection and increased driving safety . What is it ? The process consists of installing solar films on your car's windows. A recommended option if you want to enjoy a more comfortable temperature while driving and greater safety in the event of glass breakage.

sections.heading: What are the advantages of tinting windows?
content: The approved films used by Glassdrive® reflect and absorb solar heat, preventing the interior of the car from overheating compared to the outside temperature.
These are the benefits you will gain from the move:

It is important to choose a qualified professional to ensure a correct seal and benefit from a better warranty on your tinted glass. At Glassdrive® we guarantee a fast and quality installation so that you can enjoy the darkening of your car's windows and greater comfort while driving.
Contact us at 808 246 246 to find out which Glassdrive® Center is closest to you that provides this service.
list_items: Improves your safety in the event of glass breakage.
Less car-related expenses: Great fuel savings by not having to use the air conditioning as much.
Improves visibility for the driver and reduces eye strain.
Greater safety, as it prevents glare at night.
Protects interior upholstery from wear and tear caused by the sun.
Provides privacy and improves the aesthetics of the car. With Glassdrive® you will also have the homologation and installation certificate to successfully pass the Automobile Inspection .

content: Your safety is our priority!

metadata.title: Replacing the windshield wipers
metadata.description: Substituição do limpa para-brisas: segurança e visibilidade na estrada. Saiba quando e por que deve mudar as escovas do seu limpa para-brisa.

sections.heading: Replacing the wipers
content: The performance of windscreen wipers affects their visibility and safety on the road: it is essential to regularly check that they function correctly. This verification is an integral part of the service provided by Glassdrive®.

sections.heading: Worn windshield wipers?
content: See better and drive safely.

Visibility is essential for your safety. Poor wiper blades compromise it – especially with rain, fog or dirt on the glass. At Glassdrive® , we check the condition of your windshield wipers for free whenever you carry out a repair or replacement with us. If it is necessary to change, we will take care of it on the spot.
What are the risks of damaged brushes?
list_items: Reduced visibility and increased risk of accident
Possibility of fine or immobilization in case of police control
Scratches on glass caused by torn or hardened rubber
Failure in the mandatory periodic inspection (IPO)

sections.heading: When should you replace windshield wipers?
content: The lifespan of the brushes is short. They should be changed at least once a year — or sooner, if you notice:
Tip: Many drivers change their wiper blades every 6 months — in early spring and fall.
list_items: Mist or scratches on the glass surface

sections.heading: Book now at your nearest Glassdrive® Center
content: Avoid risks, improve visibility and ensure your safety.

metadata.title: Water repellent
metadata.description: Aplique o hidrorrepelente e desfrute de uma visão superior durante a condução. Menor uso das escovas para mais segurança, mesmo em condições adversas.

sections.heading: Application of water repellent on the windshield
content: Driving comfort and safety
list_items: Application of Water Repellent on the Windshield

sections.heading: Increased visibility in the rain
content: The Water repellent treatment helps to eliminate water droplets from the windscreen, also providing extra protection to the glass, both from the elements

sections.heading: How does it work?
content: We apply a waterproofing product to your car's windscreen, which will act as a water repellent. In combination with the air circulation generated by moving the car, this waterproofing helps to quickly repel water droplets from the surface of the windscreen, reducing the use of wiper blades. With the Water Repellent treatment, you will drive more safely for longer, whatever the weather conditions. This coating needs to be replaced only every 20,000 km.
Would you like to apply Water Repellent to your car's windshield? We're here to help make your driving easier and safer.
